//: SCREENSHOT-CAPABLE teammate devcontainer. Heavier than the default: adds JDK 21 + Node + Playwright so the generator can start the Mendix app and capture page screenshots. Use this ONLY if you want real screenshots; otherwise the lean devcontainer.json is faster and produces placeholders.
// use: Rename this file to devcontainer.json inside your project's .devcontainer/ folder.
name: mendix-doc-generator (with screenshots)
postCreateCommand: curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash && export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH" && npm install -g @playwright/cli@latest && npx playwright install --with-deps chromium && claude plugin marketplace add "$MARKETPLACE_URL" && claude plugin install doc-generator@blackbelt && echo '✅ doc-generator + Playwright installed — run /doc-generator:generate-doc and choose a with-screenshots output'
